description: Community plugin marketplace for Kimi Code — add your own plugins and share with the community

plugins.shortDescription: A friendly greeting plugin — great starting point for learning plugin development
Lightweight code review assistant — checks style, potential bugs, and best practices
Automatically generates conventional commit messages from staged changes
Play a configurable sound when the assistant finishes a response
Live library documentation lookup — reduces hallucinations on API signatures
E2E and integration test authoring — Playwright, Vitest, pytest from natural language
Structured TDD, code review, and debugging workflows for consistent agent behaviour
Query Kimi Code weekly quota, 5h rolling limit, and Extra Usage balance via MCP tool
